# Prompt Info

Prompt Info is a browser-based LLM token counter and cost planner built by Jonathan R. Reed through Hello.World Consulting.

Use it to inspect prompt size, tokenizer behavior, model pricing assumptions, output budgets, cache reads, cache writes, and multi-turn agent-session cost before sending a request to a model provider. The estimates are planning values, not billing guarantees.

## Key Pages

- / : Token Planner
- /format-comparison/ : Format Comparison
- /about/ : About and references
- /contact/ : Product questions, bug reports, pricing corrections, and consulting requests
- /privacy/ : Data-boundary notes for prompt handling and support requests

## Data Boundaries

- Prompt text is handled in the browser for token counting and format comparison.
- Pricing data uses a same-origin pricing API when available and a bundled model catalog as fallback.
- Do not paste API keys, customer records, unreleased launch material, or confidential transcripts into a public browser utility.

- Jonathan R. Reed: https://jonathanrreed.com/
- Hello.World Consulting: https://helloworldfirm.com/
- TOON: https://github.com/toon-format/toon
- YAML 1.2.2: https://yaml.org/spec/1.2.2/

- XML 1.1: https://www.w3.org/TR/xml11/
- CSV RFC 4180: https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc4180
- OpenAPI 3.1: https://spec.openapis.org/oas/latest.html
- JSON Schema 2020-12: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema
